title: Lyro PvP ULTIMATE
description: The ULTIMATE PvP Texture Pack you'll ever use, with over 2000+ textures all combined. Kinda like a FREE Marketplace Pack.
body:
Introducing Lyro PvP ULTIMATE. The 3rd and final installment of the Lyrian Pack Trilogy, featuring a PvP texture pack that covers 2000+ textures from guis, to blocks, items, mobs, and etc. all combined! Almost like a marketplace pack, except it's FREE!
> ‎
> This PvP Texture Pack offers..
- ‎✅ Java and Bedrock Versions!
- ‎✅ Semi-Vanilla experience.
- ‎✅ Custom GUI and UI.
- ‎✅ Low fire, outlined ores, clear water, short swords.
- ‎✅ Environment that blends together.
- ‎✅ Bow Indicator.
- ‎✅ Additional mob textures like zombies, skeletons, shulkers, and more!
‎
> ‎We hope you enjoy using this pack. More packs coming soon and DLCs as well such as optimization DLC. Standalones will also be published across trusted sites.
